content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Code Errors
content.seo_description: Learn how to debug with AI and overcome coding roadblocks. A beginner-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop burning billable hours staring at syntax errors. By leveraging AI-driven debugging, you can identify logic flaws, trace stack overflows, and refactor broken modules in seconds. Integrating tools like Antigravity and Claude Code transforms your workflow, allowing you to ship professional-grade software with surgical precision and speed.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is screaming a wall of red text that makes no sense. We have all been there—staring at a screen at 2 AM, trapped in a debugging loop that feels like trying to find a needle in a haystack of your own making. This is the moment where most freelancers lose their margin and their sanity.

But the era of manual, line-by-line troubleshooting is over. By treating AI as your senior engineering partner, you can offload the cognitive load of error analysis. This guide strips away the frustration, showing you how to weaponize Antigravity and Claude Code to turn impossible bugs into solved tickets in minutes, not hours.

steps.title: Contextual Error Injection
steps.description: Feed the AI your stack trace and the surrounding file context to ensure the solution is scoped correctly to your project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace against the provided file structure. Explain the root cause of the error and propose a fix that maintains current architectural patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze this error: [Paste Trace] and explain why it is failing in this file: [File Path]'

steps.title: Logic Flow Simulation
steps.description: When the code runs but the output is wrong, use AI to trace the state of variables through your functions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Simulate the execution of this function with these inputs. Identify the exact line where the state deviates from expected behavior.

steps.title: Refactoring for Resilience
steps.description: Don't just fix the bug; patch the vulnerability. Use AI to rewrite brittle code into robust, defensive patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: This function is causing intermittent errors. Refactor it to include proper error handling, type safety, and defensive checks.

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Create a safety net. Generate tests that specifically target the bug you just squashed to ensure it never returns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for this module that covers the edge case that caused the previous crash.

steps.title: Final Compliance Review
steps.description: Ensure your fix adheres to industry standards and doesn't introduce side effects elsewhere in the dependency tree.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a dependency impact analysis on this fix. Will this change break any downstream components in this repository?

pro_tips: Always include your package.json or dependency manifest when debugging framework-specific errors to avoid version mismatch hallucinations.
Use 'dry-run' flags in your CLI tools to see the AI's proposed file changes before applying them to your production branch.
If the AI provides a complex fix, ask it to explain the solution like a senior code reviewer to level up your own technical knowledge.
Chain your prompts: ask the AI to summarize the bug first, then propose a fix, then write the test. Don't ask for everything in one massive prompt.
Keep a 'Prompt Library' of your successful debugging sessions to reuse patterns across different client projects.
content.next_steps: Now that you have mastered AI-assisted debugging, focus on automating your deployment pipelines to ensure your bug-free code reaches production instantly.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with cryptic errors and start shipping high-value features that keep your clients coming back. Transform your freelancer workflow with the tools designed for the modern AI-first developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
